title: 2 Warren Buffett Stocks to Buy Now at an Absurd Discount
text: Berkshire Hathaway has dozens of stocks in its portfolio, and there is a solid investment case to be made for most of them. Some of Berkshire's financial stocks, in particular, are trading for extremely cheap valuations.

title: Warren Buffett Bargains: 3 Stocks With Price Tags Too Good to Ignore
text: Warren Buffett is the world's best-known value investor. The Oracle of Omaha honed his talent as a student of the legendary Benjamin Graham at Columbia University.

title: Capital One Financial Upgraded To Hold, An Undervalued Dividend Growth Opportunity
text: Capital One Financial upgraded to hold from sell. Rating in line with consensus from Wall Street and SA analysts. Some positives are dividend growth, positive equity growth, earnings YoY growth, and strong credit card businesses in the US powered by consumer spending/demand. Some headwinds are weak momentum vs the S&P 500 index, lack of a great dip-buying price opportunity, dividend yield below average, and weak revenue growth among peers.

title: Capital One (COF) Wants Dismissal of Savings Account Holder Suit
text: Capital One (COF) wants the lawsuit filed against it by savers, who were left behind in the increasing interest rate environment, to be dismissed.

title: Capital One Financial: Buy, Sell, or Hold?
text: Capital One is up this year but down 41% from its peak two years ago. The credit-card focused bank has benefited from higher interest rates, but those tailwinds are beginning to wane.

title: Q3 List Of Banks And Their Increasing Paper Losses In Their Debt Securities Portfolios
text: Many banks have reported significantly larger unrealized securities losses in 3Q as interest rates rose in the quarter. The unrealized losses have grown so large as to be orange flags for a few banks. One of the reasons there could be new increased capital requirements is because of the large unrealized losses across the banking industry.

title: Capital One (COF) Sued for Deceiving Savings Account Holders
text: Capital One (COF) faces a lawsuit from savers who were left behind amid the increasing interest rate environment.

title: What's in your portfolio? Capital One stock is worth considering
text: Inflation and high interest rates are leaving less money in American wallets

title: Capital One Stock Gained 14% YTD And Outperformed The Estimates In Q3
text: Capital One's stock (NYSE: COF) has gained 14% YTD, as compared to the 15% rise in the S&P500 over the same period.

title: Tickets on Sale Now for the 23rd Annual Food Network South Beach Wine & Food Festival Presented by Capital One
text: MIAMI BEACH, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #SOBEWFF--Tickets are officially on sale for one of the biggest, most star-studded, and delicious wine and food charity festivals in the country: the 23rd annual Food Network South Beach Wine & Food Festival presented by Capital One (SOBEWFF®). Taking place February 22-25, 2024, the four-day Festival will return with more than 105 events, Food Network's biggest stars, Grammy-winning musicians, today's biggest lifestyle personalities and more than 500+ chefs and win.

title: Capital One Announces Quarterly Dividend
text: Company also declares preferred stock dividend   MCLEAN, Va. , Nov. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE: COF) today announced a quarterly dividend of $0.60 per common share payable November 24, 2023, to stockholders of record at the close of business on November 13, 2023.
